agent.name: build-deploy-auditor
agent.role: Evaluate CI, build artifacts, and quality gates against the monorepo scripts and dashboard eslint gate.

findings.title: GitHub Actions workflow runs lint, typecheck, test, and build on push/PR
findings.description: .github/workflows/ci.yml exists with pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, lint, typecheck, test, and build on pull_request and push to main. This addresses the prior gap where no CI existed (f-749bab79).

proof_hooks.summary: jobs.checks steps: checkout, pnpm, node 22, install, lint, typecheck, test, build

history.notes: CI present in repo; contrasts with prior open finding f-749bab79 (no workflows).

findings.title: ESLint still fails: react/no-unescaped-entities in LanePanel
findings.description: Preflight lint.txt shows exit code 1: LanePanel.tsx line 74 react/no-unescaped-entities. CI lint step will fail until this is fixed or the rule is waived.

proof_hooks.summary: pnpm lint (dashboard) exits 1 with 1 error, 20 warnings

next_actions.action: Escape apostrophe or use {"'"} in LanePanel to clear lint and unblock CI.
next_actions.rationale: Single error fails eslint; CI runs lint.

next_actions.action: Mark f-749bab79 fixed_verified in canonical state if not already.
